00029 
00030 /*
00031 
00032         Test suite.
00033 
00034         This program takes the palindrome below and checks if it's
00035         a palindrome or not. It will hopefully exhibit an interesting
00036         page fault pattern.
00037 
00038         The palindrome was taken from 
00039 
00040         http://www.cs.brown.edu/people/nfp/palindrome.html
00041 
00042         This is not large enough to really stress the VM system, but
00043         might be useful for testing in the early stages of the VM
00044         assignment.
00045 */
00046 
00047 /*
00048 A man, a plan, a caret, a ban, a myriad, a sum, a lac, a liar, a hoop,
00049 a pint, a catalpa, a gas, an oil, a bird, a yell, a vat, a caw, a pax,
00050 a wag, a tax, a nay, a ram, a cap, a yam, a gay, a tsar, a wall, a
00051 car, a luger, a ward, a bin, a woman, a vassal, a wolf, a tuna, a nit,
00052 a pall, a fret, a watt, a bay, a daub, a tan, a cab, a datum, a gall, 
00053 a hat, a fag, a zap, a say, a jaw, a lay, a wet, a gallop, a tug, a
00054 trot, a trap, a tram, a torr, a caper, a top, a tonk, a toll, a ball, 
00055 a fair, a sax, a minim, a tenor, a bass, a passer, a capital, a rut, 
00056 an amen, a ted, a cabal, a tang, a sun, an ass, a maw, a sag, a jam, 
00057 a dam, a sub, a salt, an axon, a sail, an ad, a wadi, a radian, a
00058 room, a rood, a rip, a tad, a pariah, a revel, a reel, a reed, a pool,
00059 a plug, a pin, a peek, a parabola, a dog, a pat, a cud, a nu, a fan, 
00060 a pal, a rum, a nod, an eta, a lag, an eel, a batik, a mug, a mot, a
00061 nap, a maxim, a mood, a leek, a grub, a gob, a gel, a drab, a citadel,
00062 a total, a cedar, a tap, a gag, a rat, a manor, a bar, a gal, a cola, 
00063 a pap, a yaw, a tab, a raj, a gab, a nag, a pagan, a bag, a jar, a
00064 bat, a way, a papa, a local, a gar, a baron, a mat, a rag, a gap, a
00065 tar, a decal, a tot, a led, a tic, a bard, a leg, a bog, a burg, a
00066 keel, a doom, a mix, a map, an atom, a gum, a kit, a baleen, a gala, 
00067 a ten, a don, a mural, a pan, a faun, a ducat, a pagoda, a lob, a rap,
00068 a keep, a nip, a gulp, a loop, a deer, a leer, a lever, a hair, a pad,
00069 a tapir, a door, a moor, an aid, a raid, a wad, an alias, an ox, an
00070 atlas, a bus, a madam, a jag, a saw, a mass, an anus, a gnat, a lab, 
00071 a cadet, an em, a natural, a tip, a caress, a pass, a baronet, a
00072 minimax, a sari, a fall, a ballot, a knot, a pot, a rep, a carrot, 
00073 a mart, a part, a tort, a gut, a poll, a gateway, a law, a jay, a sap,
00074 a zag, a fat, a hall, a gamut, a dab, a can, a tabu, a day, a batt, 
00075 a waterfall, a patina, a nut, a flow, a lass, a van, a mow, a nib, 
00076 a draw, a regular, a call, a war, a stay, a gam, a yap, a cam, a ray, 
00077 an ax, a tag, a wax, a paw, a cat, a valley, a drib, a lion, a saga, 
00078 a plat, a catnip, a pooh, a rail, a calamus, a dairyman, a bater, 
00079 a canal - Panama! 
00080 */
00081 
00082 /* The palindrome below is a quadruple concatenation of the above */
00083 
00084 #include <stdio.h>
00085 #include <string.h>
00086 
00087 char palindrome[1000] =
00088 "amanaplanacaretabanamyriadasumalacaliarahoopapintacatalpaagasanoil"
00089 "abirdayellavatacawapaxawagataxanayaramacapayamagayatsarawalla";
00090 #if 0
00091 "caralugerawardabinawomanavassalawolfatunaanitapallafretawattabaya"
00092 "daubatanacabadatumagallahatafagazapasayajawalayawetagallopatuga"
00093 "trotatrapatramatorracaperatopatonkatollaballafairasaxaminimatenora"
00094 "bassapasseracapitalarutanamenatedacabalatangasunanassamawasaga"
00095 "jamadamasubasaltanaxonasailanadawadiaradianaroomaroodaripatada"
00096 "pariaharevelareelareedapoolaplugapinapeekaparabolaadogapatacudanua"
00097 "fanapalarumanodanetaalaganeelabatikamugamotanapamaximamooda"
00098 "leekagrubagobageladrabacitadelatotalacedaratapagagaratamanorabara"
00099 "galacolaapapayawatabarajagabanagapaganabagajarabatawayapapaa"
00100 "localagarabaronamataragagapataradecalatotaledaticabardalegaboga"
00101 "burgakeeladoomamixamapanatomagumakitabaleenagalaatenadonamurala"
00102 "panafaunaducatapagodaalobarapakeepanipagulpaloopadeeraleeralevera"
00103 "hairapadatapiradooramooranaidaraidawadanaliasanoxanatlasabusamadam"
00104 "ajagasawamassananusagnatalabacadetanemanaturalatipacaressapassa"
00105 "baronetaminimaxasariafallaballotaknotapotarepacarrotamartapartatorta"
00106 "gutapollagatewayalawajayasapazagafatahallagamutadabacanatabuaday"
00107 "abattawaterfallapatinaanutaflowalassavanamowanibadrawaregularacalla"
00108 "warastayagamayapacamarayanaxatagawaxapawacatavalleyadribaliona"
00109 "sagaaplatacatnipapooharailacalamusadairymanabateracanalpanama"
00110 "amanaplanacaretabanamyriadasumalacaliarahoopapintacatalpaagasanoil"
00111 "abirdayellavatacawapaxawagataxanayaramacapayamagayatsarawalla"
00112 "caralugerawardabinawomanavassalawolfatunaanitapallafretawattabaya"
00113 "daubatanacabadatumagallahatafagazapasayajawalayawetagallopatuga"
00114 "trotatrapatramatorracaperatopatonkatollaballafairasaxaminimatenora"
00115 "bassapasseracapitalarutanamenatedacabalatangasunanassamawasaga"
00116 "jamadamasubasaltanaxonasailanadawadiaradianaroomaroodaripatada"
00117 "pariaharevelareelareedapoolaplugapinapeekaparabolaadogapatacudanua"
00118 "fanapalarumanodanetaalaganeelabatikamugamotanapamaximamooda"
00119 "leekagrubagobageladrabacitadelatotalacedaratapagagaratamanorabara"
00120 "galacolaapapayawatabarajagabanagapaganabagajarabatawayapapaa"
00121 "localagarabaronamataragagapataradecalatotaledaticabardalegaboga"
00122 "burgakeeladoomamixamapanatomagumakitabaleenagalaatenadonamurala"
00123 "panafaunaducatapagodaalobarapakeepanipagulpaloopadeeraleeralevera"
00124 "hairapadatapiradooramooranaidaraidawadanaliasanoxanatlasabusamadam"
00125 "ajagasawamassananusagnatalabacadetanemanaturalatipacaressapassa"
00126 "baronetaminimaxasariafallaballotaknotapotarepacarrotamartapartatorta"
00127 "gutapollagatewayalawajayasapazagafatahallagamutadabacanatabuaday"
00128 "abattawaterfallapatinaanutaflowalassavanamowanibadrawaregularacalla"
00129 "warastayagamayapacamarayanaxatagawaxapawacatavalleyadribaliona"
00130 "sagaaplatacatnipapooharailacalamusadairymanabateracanalpanama"
00131 "amanaplanacaretabanamyriadasumalacaliarahoopapintacatalpaagasanoil"
00132 "abirdayellavatacawapaxawagataxanayaramacapayamagayatsarawalla"
00133 "caralugerawardabinawomanavassalawolfatunaanitapallafretawattabaya"
00134 "daubatanacabadatumagallahatafagazapasayajawalayawetagallopatuga"
00135 "trotatrapatramatorracaperatopatonkatollaballafairasaxaminimatenora"
00136 "bassapasseracapitalarutanamenatedacabalatangasunanassamawasaga"
00137 "jamadamasubasaltanaxonasailanadawadiaradianaroomaroodaripatada"
00138 "pariaharevelareelareedapoolaplugapinapeekaparabolaadogapatacudanua"

00143 "burgakeeladoomamixamapanatomagumakitabaleenagalaatenadonamurala"
00144 "panafaunaducatapagodaalobarapakeepanipagulpaloopadeeraleeralevera"
00145 "hairapadatapiradooramooranaidaraidawadanaliasanoxanatlasabusamadam"
00146 "ajagasawamassananusagnatalabacadetanemanaturalatipacaressapassa"
00147 "baronetaminimaxasariafallaballotaknotapotarepacarrotamartapartatorta"
00148 "gutapollagatewayalawajayasapazagafatahallagamutadabacanatabuaday"
00149 "abattawaterfallapatinaanutaflowalassavanamowanibadrawaregularacalla"
00150 "warastayagamayapacamarayanaxatagawaxapawacatavalleyadribaliona"
00151 "sagaaplatacatnipapooharailacalamusadairymanabateracanalpanama"
00152 "amanaplanacaretabanamyriadasumalacaliarahoopapintacatalpaagasanoil"
00153 "abirdayellavatacawapaxawagataxanayaramacapayamagayatsarawalla"
00154 "caralugerawardabinawomanavassalawolfatunaanitapallafretawattabaya"
00155 "daubatanacabadatumagallahatafagazapasayajawalayawetagallopatuga"
00156 "trotatrapatramatorracaperatopatonkatollaballafairasaxaminimatenora"
00157 "bassapasseracapitalarutanamenatedacabalatangasunanassamawasaga"
00158 "jamadamasubasaltanaxonasailanadawadiaradianaroomaroodaripatada"
00159 "pariaharevelareelareedapoolaplugapinapeekaparabolaadogapatacudanua"
00160 "fanapalarumanodanetaalaganeelabatikamugamotanapamaximamooda"
00161 "leekagrubagobageladrabacitadelatotalacedaratapagagaratamanorabara"
00162 "galacolaapapayawatabarajagabanagapaganabagajarabatawayapapaa"
00163 "localagarabaronamataragagapataradecalatotaledaticabardalegaboga"
00164 "burgakeeladoomamixamapanatomagumakitabaleenagalaatenadonamurala"
00165 "panafaunaducatapagodaalobarapakeepanipagulpaloopadeeraleeralevera"
00166 "hairapadatapiradooramooranaidaraidawadanaliasanoxanatlasabusamadam"
00167 "ajagasawamassananusagnatalabacadetanemanaturalatipacaressapassa"
00168 "baronetaminimaxasariafallaballotaknotapotarepacarrotamartapartatorta"
00169 "gutapollagatewayalawajayasapazagafatahallagamutadabacanatabuaday"
00170 "abattawaterfallapatinaanutaflowalassavanamowanibadrawaregularacalla"
00171 "warastayagamayapacamarayanaxatagawaxapawacatavalleyadribaliona"
00172 "sagaaplatacatnipapooharailacalamusadairymanabateracanalpanama";
00173 #endif
00174 
00175 int
00176 main()
00177 {
00178         char *start, *end;
00179         
00180         printf("Welcome to the palindrome tester!\n");
00181         printf("I will take a large palindrome and test it.\n");
00182         printf("Here it is:\n");
00183         printf("%s\n", palindrome);
00184 
00185         printf("Testing...");
00186         /* skip to end */
00187         end = palindrome+strlen(palindrome);
00188         end--;
00189 
00190         for (start = palindrome; start <= end; start++, end--) {
00191                 putchar('.');
00192                 if (*start != *end) {
00193                         printf("NOT a palindrome\n");
00194                         return 0;
00195                 }
00196         }
00197         
00198         printf("IS a palindrome\n");
00199         return 0;
00200 }
Generated on Sun Jun 27 22:12:14 2010 for Os/161 by  1.6.1
